atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an ulcer on his right foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer has been present for approximately six to eight weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer was likely caused by stepping on a nail

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports blood sugar levels have been running higher than normal

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional mild foot pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional headaches attributed to stress

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional numbness in his feet

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness in his feet is particularly present in colder weather

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports quitting smoking approximately four years ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes aspirin daily as prescribed

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a two by three centimeter ulcerated lesion on the right lateral foot near the fifth metatarsophalangeal joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is no associated cellulitis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The wound demonstrates granulation tissue.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The wound demonstrates some purulent discharge.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure 127/78 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart rate 64 bpm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Temperature 98.6°F.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis and posterior tibial pulses are palpable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Jugular venous distension is absent.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Carotid bruits are absent.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lung sounds are clear bilaterally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The heart murmur is a two out of six systolic ejection murmur heard at the left base.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with a non-healing ulcer on the right foot, likely secondary to underlying diabetes and vascular insufficiency.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His history of smoking and current blood sugar control contribute to the risk of complications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an arterial ultrasound

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes aspirin

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician requests a podiatry consultation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to discuss ultrasound results and podiatry recommendations with the patient

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in four weeks
